subcodes.first_line: In this day all who dwell upon the earth are bound to follow the divine commandments, for these are the cause of order in the world and its foundation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم کل من علی الارض مکلفند بمتابعت اوامر الهی چه که اوست سبب نظم عالم و علت
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @goodly deeds; actions
